description.zh-Hans: 使用六边形邻接距离生成无抗锯齿的像素蜂窝，具有连续蜂窝壁、双向倒角和逐格离散色阶。
description.en: Generates anti-alias-free pixel honeycomb from hexagonal neighbor distances with continuous walls, directional bevels, and per-cell discrete tones.

triggers.zh-Hans: 蜂窝, 六边形, 蜂巢

exampleUsage.zh-Hans: 生成六边形蜂窝图案，适用于科幻或自然风格的像素艺术墙面。
exampleUsage.en: Generate a hexagonal honeycomb pattern suitable for sci-fi or nature-themed pixel art walls.
